conditions.natural_language: A red car is always a convertible.

recommendation.action: Verify the vehicle type against the fleet registry.

conditions.natural_language: Pressure must stay between 8.0 and 10.0 atm during production.

recommendation.action: Check valve configuration and recalibrate sensor.

conditions.natural_language: A standard car weighs 1000 kg. The total fleet weight must equal OBS_CAR_COUNT multiplied by 1000 kg (±150 kg tolerance per vehicle). If the observed total weight deviates significantly from this expected value, a load anomaly or miscounted vehicles should be suspected.

recommendation.action: Re-count vehicles and verify individual load readings against the 1000 kg baseline.

conditions.natural_language: Safe operating temperature range is 15 °C (minimum warm-up threshold) to 80 °C (maximum continuous rated temperature). Below 15 °C the lubricant viscosity becomes too high for safe operation. Above 80 °C thermal runaway risk increases sharply and component lifetime degrades by ~50 % for every 10 °C above the rated maximum.

recommendation.action: Check cooling circuit and ambient conditions. Below 15 °C: allow warm-up cycle. Above 80 °C: reduce load immediately and inspect cooling.

conditions.natural_language: Tank capacity is 5000 litres. The operational band is 10 % (500 L minimum reserve, below which pump cavitation risk rises) to 90 % (4500 L maximum fill, leaving a 500 L thermal expansion buffer). Falling below 10 % triggers an automatic low-level alarm; exceeding 90 % risks overflow through the pressure-relief vent.

possible_causes: overflow due to stuck-open fill valve

recommendation.action: Below 10 %: stop process and refill immediately. Above 90 %: close fill valve and inspect overflow protection.

conditions.natural_language: Fleet vehicles are rated for a maximum safe highway speed of 120 km/h. The manufacturer's tyre speed rating is 130 km/h (category H); the 10 km/h margin is the company policy buffer for safety. Any reading above 120 km/h constitutes a policy violation and must be flagged regardless of road type or driver intent.

possible_causes: vehicle under remote control without speed limiter active

recommendation.action: Alert fleet manager immediately. Review driver telemetry log and issue a corrective-action notice if confirmed.
